files.help:
By default `ly` saves its log file in the user's home directory.

You can move `ly-session.log` by changing the value of `session_log`
field in _/etc/ly/config.ini_ file using your favourite editor.

```bash
$ sudo nano /etc/ly/config.ini      # using nano
$ sudo vim /etc/ly/config.ini       # using vim
```

(_/etc/ly/config.ini_)
```config
session_log = .local/state/ly-session.log
```
